ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "category" INTEGER /* ID of the category to which the product belongs */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the product */,
  "product_images" TEXT /* URLs of product images */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seller of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_seller_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user on the platform */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered on the platform */,
  "reviews_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews submitted by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review that has been reported */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the report */,
  "report_reason" TEXT /* Reason for reporting the review */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was submitted */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (pending, resolved, dismissed) */,
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the moderator who handled the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_reports_moderator_id FOREIGN KEY ("moderator_id") REFERENCES moderators ("moderator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderators" (
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each moderator */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the moderator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the moderator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the moderator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the moderator (admin, moderator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("moderator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_helpfulness" (
  "helpfulness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each helpfulness record */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the helpfulness */,
  "is_helpful" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user found the review helpful */,
  "helpfulness_score" REAL /* Average helpfulness score of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("helpfulness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_helpfulness_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
